description: Condition: Used - Good. Character: Animal. Interactive toy farm playset has a red barn with working lights. It comes with several animal figures including a chicken, a pink mouse, a sheep, a purple horse, a green cow, and a pink rabbit.

expected.visit_summary_must_convey: Promising listing but ask about price, completeness, usage, and whether interactive features work before you drive
must_include_reason_themes: text and photos match with specific animal and color details
real home photos from multiple angles not stock images
condition described as used good but limited usage history
no listed price or original retail context for trip worthiness
cannot verify interactive features or lights working from photos alone
should_ask_seller: how long has this been used
are there any components that are missing
what is the interactive part and is everything working as expected
must_not_include: proximity or meetup location as grading signal
grading as Good without price completeness and working features confirmed

notes.photo_signal: Three real home photos of a red interactive farm barn with silo; animals visible across angles match listed colors and types. Lights not shown on in photos; completeness of all pieces unclear across shots.
notes.why_this_grade: Leaning good — strong text-photo match and thoughtful listing effort — but not enough to drive yet: no price, unknown usage length, missing components unconfirmed, and interactive or light features not demonstrated in photos.
notes.pm_note: Do not grade on fun or value for money without price. Specific color details may be LLM-assisted seller text; still a positive listing-quality signal.
